name: Surreal Entertainment Mister Rogers Sweater Changing Mug | Sweater Changes With Heat | Holds 16 Ounces
description: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood is an American half-hour educational children's television series that was created and hosted by Fred Rogers. This collectible makes the perfect present for birthdays, house-warming parties, Christmas, Hanukkah, graduation, and much more! Gift this collectable mug to the Mister Rogers fan in your life to show your appreciation for them.
